name: Kilim
description: Carpet diamonds stacked one inside the other in dyed wool — every redraw re-knots the motifs and lets each diamond settle at its own tilt.

code.style: --wool1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color4)); --wool2: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(10%, 17%); background: var(--wool1); transform: rotate(@rand(41deg, 49deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(29%, 38%); background: var(--wool2); transform: rotate(@rand(38deg, 52deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.3) { :after { background: var(--color3); border-radius: 50%; } } transition: ease 600ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
